hooks.command: powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Claude Code needs your attention', 'Claude Code')"
notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Claude Code needs your attention'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Claude Code"'
